title: Spree
actors: Vic Damone, Jayne Mansfield, Juliet Prowse
plot: Highlighted in this journalistic view of Las Vegas are various cabaret acts at The Tropicana and at The Dunes. Included are a striptease number by Jayne Mansfield, a take-off on Cleopatra by Juliet Prowse, scenes of Vic Damone per...
